mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_number = u.user_number
AND (r.review_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.review_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT r.review_number, r.review_title, r.review_content, r.review_rating, r.review_image, r.image_url, r.created_date, r.modified_date, u.user_name, u.user_number FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_number = u.user_number WHERE r.review_number = #{reviewNumber}

SELECT r.review_number, r.review_title, r.review_content, r.review_rating, r.review_image, r.image_url, r.created_date, r.modified_date, u.user_name, u.user_number FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_number = u.user_number WHERE r.user_number = #{userNumber} ORDER BY r.created_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (review_title, review_content, review_rating, review_image, image_url, user_number, created_date, modified_date) VALUES (#{reviewTitle}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewRating}, #{reviewImage}, #{imageUrl}, #{userNumber}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET review_title = #{reviewTitle}, review_content = #{reviewContent}, review_rating = #{reviewRating}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE review_number = #{reviewNumber} AND user_number = #{userNumber}
